projects.title: TIMEKEEPER – Next-Gen Optical Timing Technology
projects.description: TIMEKEEPER Research to Business project is aiming towards developing and pre-commercializing all-optical timing technology with ENZ meta surfaces. Accurate time interval measurements and synchronization between two events are highly desirable in different fields of science and technology,...

projects.title: PivotCore - Market‑ready control for industrial power conversion
projects.description: The project’s goal is to prepare a market-ready control technology for large industrial power-conversion equipment, so manufacturers and operators can adopt improved, lower-risk solutions that cut costs and speed deployment. Industrial converters increasingly face higher performance and operational...
